title: Executive Order 13010—Critical Infrastructure Protection

flags.justification: A multi-layered structure (Commission reporting through a Principals Committee that reviews all recommendations, overseen by a Steering Committee) with broadly representative membership across ten agencies.

Sec. 4(g) requires ongoing reports and recommendations 'as they become available,' explicitly stating the Commission 'shall not limit itself to producing one final report' — real, continuing accountability.
Multiple related functions (threat assessment, policy recommendation, interim coordination) all coherently serve one purpose: critical infrastructure protection.
This is a study and interim-coordination structure; no binding compliance regime is created against private infrastructure owners by this order itself.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.

Sec. 6(f) sets an explicit one-year termination for the Commission and related bodies, and Sec. 7(h) sets a defined termination for the interim task force tied to the Commission's own termination — a well-designed, staged sunset.
Sec. 7(b) explicitly states the interim task force 'will not supplant any existing programs or organizations.'

Sec. 4(b) requires the Commission to identify and consult with public and private sector infrastructure owners and operators and with Congress — a genuine, structured multi-stakeholder engagement requirement.
This is the foundational federal framework for critical infrastructure and cybersecurity policy, the direct institutional precursor to the modern U.S. cybersecurity apparatus — genuinely significant.
An elaborate but carefully structured multi-committee design with clearly defined roles at each level.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (positive). Structural weight: 1/16 = 6.25%. The foundational order for U.S. critical infrastructure and cybersecurity policy — this Commission's work led directly to PDD-63 and the broader federal cybersecurity framework that followed. Scores very low due to careful, consultative, multi-layered design despite its genuinely foundational significance.
